Free Download

Organize your small apartment without drilling, damage, or wasting money.

Get Mary's room-by-room checklist of renter-friendly storage ideas for your kitchen, bathroom, closet, entryway, and hidden clutter zones.

Download the Free Checklist

No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.

What this checklist does for you

  • Know exactly what to buy — and skip everything that won't actually help
  • Organize your kitchen, bathroom, closet, and entryway without guessing
  • Stop wasting money on bins and organizers that don't fit or solve the problem
  • Every product on the list is renter-friendly — no drilling, no damage
  • Start with the one room that's been bothering you most
Get the Free Checklist

What's inside

One checklist. Five rooms. Every product is renter-safe and budget-conscious.

🍳

Kitchen

Cabinet risers, drawer dividers, pantry alternatives, spice storage

🪥

Bathroom

Shower storage, over-toilet towers, under-sink organizers, towel solutions

👗

Closet

Slim hangers, hanging organizers, shoe storage, seasonal items

🚪

Entryway

Drop zone solutions, coat hooks, shoe trays, key and mail organization

🔍

Hidden Clutter Zones

Under the bed, top of the fridge, laundry area, forgotten corners

Mary's Reset Kit

$17 · Digital download

Want more structure?

Get the full room-by-room reset kit for $17

The free checklist tells you what to buy. The Reset Kit gives you the full plan — 10 worksheets, a 7-day reset schedule, a measurement tracker, and a weekly routine to stay organized.

See the Reset Kit — $17

One-time payment · Instant download · No tools needed

Questions about the checklist

Is the checklist really free?

Yes — completely free. No credit card, no catch. You'll get it delivered to your email instantly after you sign up.

What format is it in?

A PDF you can print or use digitally on any phone, tablet, or laptop that supports PDFs.

I rent a studio. Will this help me?

Yes. The checklist was written specifically with studios, one-bedrooms, and small apartments in mind.

Will I be spammed?

No. You'll receive the checklist and occasional emails with organization ideas and product recommendations. Unsubscribe any time with one click.

Do the products require drilling?

No. Every product is renter-friendly — no drills, no wall damage, nothing that would void your lease.
